title: dactylis polygama f. ciliata
intro: Dactylis polygama f. ciliata, also known as Meadow Grass or Ciliata grass, is a perennial grass species native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Dactylis polygama f. ciliata include its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and alleviate respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional remedies for skin issues and wounds.
